productDisplayName: Nike Men Avid Black Casual Shoes
description: Style Note Designed for lightweight comfort, the nike men's Avid Skate shoes will match the enthusiasm of the hard-core skater. Whether you’re pounding the pavement on your board or shuffling off to class, you’ll be looking good in the classic, streamlined style of these Nike Avid shoes. Product Details Made with a breathable leather upper with a cushy footbed and a lightweight rubber outsole Protective overlays for increased durability and a central lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Rubber taping on midsole for extra durability with a padded tongue and collar for all-day comfort Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort TPR outsole with lightweight rubber Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
